CustomField.description: Auto-fills when the Zip code is entered. Tip: Use the Copy Address to Contacts link to sync with the Contact record. Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Do not change this field or hide it from the layout.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
Auto-fills when the Zip code is entered.
Tip: Use the Copy Address to Contacts link to sync with the Contact record.
CustomField.label: Applicant City
